## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat/`)
- [ ] Chore / maintenance (`chore/`)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named with the correct prefix (`feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] `npm run lint -w client` passes with no new errors
- [ ] TypeScript compiles cleanly in both `client/` and `server/`
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds end-to-end
- [ ] Manually verified in the browser (golden path + edge cases)
- [ ] No unrelated files or debug code included
